userStories.title: Example: First task with no dependencies
userStories.description: As a [role] I want [goal] so that [benefit]
acceptanceCriteria: Specific, testable criterion the agent can verify
e.g. 'npm test passes with no failures'

userStories.title: Example: Second task that depends on US-001
userStories.description: As a [role] I want [goal] so that [benefit]
acceptanceCriteria: Criteria should be things the agent can check programmatically
e.g. 'npm run lint passes with no errors'
